_comment: Wishlist of framework pages to ingest, drained over time by aa-backlog-fill.yml (trickled, dedup'd against existing pages + open kb-ingest PRs). Add entries by hand or promote them from the kb-aa-watch issue. Each: kind=framework, country (ISO3), hazard, slug (EXISTING folder for older versions; omit to default <iso3>-<hazard>), version (filename; omit to let Claude pick), doc (start URL), note.
